title: Pige complete UI design and visual-regression contract
status: UI Design handoff; not production implementation evidence

boundary: Use observable layout, typography, color, icon geometry, motion, and interaction conventions only.
Do not copy ChatGPT components, JavaScript bundles, brand artwork, or private implementation code.
Pige production behavior remains governed by docs/UI_PROTOTYPE.md and subject-owner contracts.

icon_system.self_contained_review_cache: 36 symbols are also embedded in index.html so the review HTML remains functional as a standalone static artifact
icon_system.source_evidence: Open-source createLucideIcon modules and named per-icon assets identified in the inspected desktop bundle; no proprietary product icon is a build input.
rules: Use the pinned full Lucide family for every common shell, navigation, content-action, Settings, status, and capability glyph; do not substitute emoji, text placeholders, arbitrary raw SVG, or a second common icon family.
The 36-symbol prototype sprite is an exact review subset of the pinned family; it is not the production library or a license to draw one-off glyphs.
Pin uses one vertically centered needle and balanced shoulders; Settings uses a gear and must remain visibly distinct from Appearance and System theme symbols.
Icon-only controls retain an accessible name, tooltip, stable hit target, and visible hover and focus-visible states.
Pige brand artwork and genuinely product-specific semantics remain independently owned; do not import proprietary client glyphs.

tokens.font_mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, SF Mono, Menlo, Consolas, monospace

component_rules: Sidebar toggle is a rounded pane outline with one vertical divider, no arrow, and one stable glyph for both states.
Expanded titlebar and sidebar share the same under-surface color with no seam.
Back and forward controls are absent unless real user history exists.
Icon buttons are borderless at rest and use a quiet gray hover fill.
Cards are reserved for bounded objects and decisions; settings use one hairline container with separators.
Home has one dominant composer; shortcuts, progress, confirmations, and citations remain subordinate.
Supported file-format glyphs are a static legend, never six false action buttons; Add file and drop remain the only file-choice affordances.
Home file processing defaults to one compact row; disclosure reveals five 44 px rows, then keeps panel height fixed and scrolls additional rows internally.
The composer exposes one actual model switcher with a green connected or red unavailable dot before the model name; it never substitutes a generic connected-status sentence for model choice.
Pointer focus never creates a permanent blue composer box; keyboard focus retains a native-blue focus-visible ring.
Settings is a separate stable-size window and must not resize or reflow the main Pige window.
Opening or switching a note preserves the user-owned sidebar state, and switching notes preserves the Note Agent disclosure state; note routing must not silently reopen or collapse either panel.
With no saved sidebar preference, direct note-family routes default to full three-pane disclosure at 1112 px and above; below 1112 px they start with an unobscured reader and closed overlays.

At 1112–1439 px the note layout keeps the 280 px sidebar and 432 px Agent rail resident and gives the remaining width to the reader; at 1440 px and above the reader returns to its 680 px reference width.

At 680–1111 px the reader stays within 680 px with no horizontal document overflow; the sidebar and Note Agent are independent overlays, the Note Agent is closed by default, and Escape dismisses only the active overlay.
Enter sends, Shift+Enter inserts a newline, and active IME plus the 80 ms composition-end race cannot send.
When a transition removes the focused control, focus moves to the owning toggle, restored search or node, or newly visible step heading instead of falling to the document body.
Reduced motion removes spatial interpolation without removing state feedback.

Knowledge Tree is a deterministic data visualization, not a fixed illustration: stable topic IDs preserve growth direction; domain/topic weight controls trunk and branch width; knowledge-unit count controls side-branch depth and canopy density; evidence density and confidence control node size and color depth.
Common system glyphs use the one governed Lucide-aligned sprite; Settings is a gear, Appearance is a palette, and Pin is optically centered.
interaction_contract: The Settings entry navigates deterministically in the prototype; production opens the same route in its independent stable-size BrowserWindow.
Every notebook group is a native button with aria-expanded, keyboard activation, animated disclosure, and session-restored expansion state.
Every visible notebook row opens the three-pane reader, preserves the sidebar state, and updates the breadcrumb, Markdown title, Agent pane title, and active-row state.

The Home processing strip owns file progress, pause, continue, and removal actions; collapse removes its rows from keyboard and accessibility traversal, and removal returns focus to the next safe action.
The model listbox supports arrow-key movement and Escape, reports the selected model and availability, and restores focus to the composer switcher after selection.

Knowledge Tree nodes are selectable controls and update one shared detail surface without adding modal or navigation complexity; search supersedes the previous branch dimming until the query is cleared.
Library search filters notes, sources, topics, and tags as the user types and exposes an explicit empty result state.
First-run vault choices, permission decisions, model-egress decisions, voice completion, retry, Activity Undo, selection actions, and note proposals all resolve visibly and disable stale actions.
No visible primary control is a decorative dead end; intentionally illustrative secondary controls return localized prototype feedback.

screens.name: Duplicate file remains a single attachment
Unsupported file is rejected without losing the draft
Notes, sources, topics, and tags search
Library Notes, Sources, Topics, and Tags
Three-pane Markdown reader and note Agent
Persistent Dataset table and source citation
First run restore preview and identity mode

verification_dimensions: Type scale, line height, and wrapping
Gray and surface hierarchy plus hairlines
Icon geometry and 28 to 34 px hit targets
Keyboard focus, labels, busy and disabled state, and IME-safe send behavior
150 and 300 ms motion plus reduced-motion fallback
No raw path, prompt, model body, provider error, command, credential, or private data
Single ownership of status and action surfaces

known_visual_discrepancies: Automated raster overlay remains open beyond the measured shared primitives and seven Pige-only canonical baselines.
Spoken screen-reader announcement and assembled platform text-rendering review remain open.
